title: Build MAP Archive/Retention System (retention rules, staleness marking)
description: Per Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md secondary gap: notes/brain-compaction-guide.md already defines when to compact, what to preserve, what to archive, but archive/retention was not formalized as a standalone system with statuses, retention rules, and compaction cadence. Build MAP_System/ARCHIVE_RETENTION_SYSTEM.md. Must extend (not duplicate) notes/brain-compaction-guide.md, cross-link Self-Repair (stale artifacts are a repair signal), Change Control (artifact retirement rules already defined there -- this system defines archive vs retirement distinction), and Context System (forbidden/stale context rules already touch this). Depends on TASK-115 (shared decisions.md touch point); do not submit until TASK-115 is released. Register all output_paths upfront including cross-link edits.
acceptance_criteria: MAP_System/ARCHIVE_RETENTION_SYSTEM.md exists and defines archive statuses, retention rules, compaction cadence, how to mark stale artifacts, and how to distinguish history from current truth
ARCHIVE_RETENTION_SYSTEM.md extends notes/brain-compaction-guide.md rather than duplicating its compaction logic, and distinguishes archiving from CHANGE_CONTROL_SYSTEM.md's artifact retirement
ARCHIVE_RETENTION_SYSTEM.md cross-links SELF_REPAIR_SYSTEM.md, CHANGE_CONTROL_SYSTEM.md, and CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md
shared/decisions.md gets a new DECISION entry recording Archive/Retention System adoption
events/events.jsonl has PROGRESS/SUBMISSION entries tracing the build
